# v18.4 — Opening Gameplay Loop

Preserved Phaser and all v18.3 systems. Added the first complete RPG-style loop:

- Objective log starts with Coach objective: scout Campus Quad and recruit one wrestler.
- Objective updates automatically after first recruit beyond starter.
- Scout encounters now show portrait, weight, style, potential, starting techniques, and recruit odds.
- Scout report options: Recruit, Scout Further, Leave.
- Recruiting odds scale with GR, seen status, and Film Study.
- Expanded WRESTLERS menu with six roster slots, HP/EP, weight, style, archetype, and lead selection.
- Experience and level-up flow preserved, with starter technique progression hooks.
- Added Rival, Study Hall tutor, hidden Tape, hidden Film Study, and additional tutorial dialogue.
- Added enterable Study Hall from Campus Quad and return to Quad.
- Preserved Field House sparring, Campus Quad scouting, battles, saves, menus, deployment sync.

Verification checklist:
- Phaser retained.
- Field House and Campus Quad retained.
- Study Hall transition added.
- Battles/scouting/recruiting/save-load/menu systems preserved.
- Root and dist folders synchronized.
